seo_title: Overactive Bladder vs Stress Incontinence After 40: Key Differences and Treatments
meta_description: Confused about overactive bladder vs stress incontinence? This guide helps women over 40 understand the difference, why each worsens after 40, and what evidence-based treatments actually work for each condition.
